title: Verify proper product name is displayed on onboarding screen after pairing a Falcon device
steps: 1. Pair a Falcon device (code name) with the system.
2. Navigate to Device Settings.
3. Select the paired Falcon device from the device list.
4. Click on 'Onboarding' from the device settings menu.
5. Observe the device name displayed on the onboarding screen.
expected: The onboarding screen displays the proper product name (e.g., 'Poly Studio' or the official marketing name) for the Falcon device, not the code name 'Falcon'.

title: Verify device code name is not shown on onboarding screen after pairing a Falcon device
steps: 1. Pair a Falcon device (code name) with the system.
2. Navigate to Device Settings.
3. Select the paired Falcon device from the device list.
4. Click on 'Onboarding' from the device settings menu.
5. Check the device name displayed on the onboarding screen for any occurrence of the code name 'Falcon'.
expected: The onboarding screen does NOT display the code name 'Falcon'. Only the proper product name (e.g., 'Poly Studio' or official marketing name) is shown.

title: Verify onboarding screen displays correct product name after navigating from Device Settings for a paired Falcon device
steps: 1. Pair a Falcon device (code name) with the system.
2. Navigate to Device Settings.
3. Locate the paired Falcon device in the device list and select it.
4. Navigate to the 'Onboarding' option within the device settings.
5. Capture the device name displayed on the onboarding screen.
6. Compare the captured name against the expected proper product name (e.g., 'Poly Studio').
expected: The device name displayed on the onboarding screen matches the proper product name (e.g., 'Poly Studio') and does not contain the code name 'Falcon'.

title: Verify onboarding screen product name consistency across multiple Falcon device pairings
steps: 1. Pair a first Falcon device (code name) with the system.
2. Navigate to Device Settings > select the device > Onboarding.
3. Record the displayed device name.
4. Unpair the first Falcon device.
5. Pair a second Falcon device (code name) with the system.
6. Navigate to Device Settings > select the device > Onboarding.
7. Record the displayed device name.
8. Compare the recorded names from both devices.
expected: Both Falcon devices display the same proper product name (e.g., 'Poly Studio' or official marketing name) on their respective onboarding screens, and neither shows the code name 'Falcon'.

title: Verify onboarding screen product name persists after device reconnection for a Falcon device
steps: 1. Pair a Falcon device (code name) with the system.
2. Navigate to Device Settings > select the device > Onboarding.
3. Verify the proper product name is displayed.
4. Disconnect the Falcon device.
5. Reconnect the Falcon device.
6. Navigate to Device Settings > select the device > Onboarding.
7. Observe the device name displayed on the onboarding screen.
expected: After reconnection, the onboarding screen still displays the proper product name (e.g., 'Poly Studio' or official marketing name) and not the code name 'Falcon'.
